query: SELECT timerAtivo, COUNT(*) as qtd FROM leads WHERE origemWebhook = 1 GROUP BY timerAtivo UNION ALL SELECT 'total_webhook' as timerAtivo, COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE origemWebhook = 1;
